Check out my latest work

A selection of my best work, spanning AI integration, real-time communications, and enterprise-scale management systems.

Chat-NCERT

A web-based academic assistant for NCERT content with structured question–answer interaction. Integrated local LLM responses using Ollama for query processing and contextual answer generation.

Infinity College System

During My Internship, I architected this role-based admission portal using PHP, MySQL, and a strict MVC pattern. Optimized SQL queries for efficient data handling and implemented secure, JWT-based authentication.
